name: The 13th Floor
short_description: As a weary security guard, navigate a 13-story office building to find your way home. Traverse each floor on foot, moving between elevators while observing subtle details. Set in broad daylight, this exploration game blends curiosity with logic as you uncover the building's secrets.
detailed_description:
The 13th Floor

Step into the shoes of a weary security guard trying to end your shift in a massive office building. The elevators seem to have a peculiar system, and descending to the ground floor is far from simple.

To make your way down, you must traverse each floor on foot, moving between two elevators. If you encounter irregularities or anomalies, you’ll need to return to the first elevator to reset the system. However, if all appears normal, you can proceed to the next elevator and descend another floor.

This project is my debut as an indie developer, crafted with passion and attention to detail. The 13th Floor offers a unique exploration experience, challenging your perception and observation skills. Navigate intricate office layouts, uncover subtle details, and immerse yourself in the quiet mystery of this modern maze.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
